header: From composer require to a themed site — in one sitting
description: Four steps stand between you and a fully seeded, themed TYPO3 site. No configuration files, no license keys — and if you'd rather not lift a finger, the creators install and set it up for €890.

items.title: Install
items.description: composer require webconsulting/desiderio on any TYPO3 14.3+ site with PHP 8.3+. That single command brings all 244 elements, 49 components, and the theme layer.

image.title: Developer laptop with code
image.alternative: Hands typing on a laptop keyboard during development work.
image.description: Copyright/credit: Photo by Glenn Carstens-Peters on Unsplash. Used as seeded demo imagery.

items.title: Seed
items.description: Run desiderio:styleguide:seed once and a complete demo site appears — idempotent, workspaces-safe, with all 244 elements filled with realistic content.

image.title: Desiderio page module preview
image.alternative: TYPO3 page module showing seeded Desiderio content elements with backend previews.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

items.title: Theme
items.description: Pick one of 15 shadcn presets in site settings — or a different one per page subtree — and the whole site repaints at runtime. Dark mode comes along for free.

image.title: Desiderio theme site settings
image.alternative: TYPO3 site settings module showing the Desiderio theme preset options.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

items.title: Create
items.description: Editors compose pages from 244 previewed elements — or edit content right on the page with the Visual Editor. No training course required.

image.title: Editing in the Desiderio Visual Editor
image.alternative: TYPO3 Visual Editor with inline editing of a Desiderio content element on the page.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.
